label: Agent introduced themselves, company, and purpose clearly
description: 1. Opening & Compliance: Did the agent introduce themselves, the company, and purpose clearly?

label: Call recording disclosure provided
description: 1. Opening & Compliance: Did the agent provide the call recording disclosure before proceeding?

label: DPA completed correctly
description: 1. Opening & Compliance: Did the agent complete DPA correctly (name, address, postcode, bill payer)?

label: Permission obtained after verification
description: 1. Opening & Compliance: Did the agent obtain permission to proceed after verification?

label: Full needs analysis completed
description: 2. Needs & KOA Discovery: Did the agent complete a full needs analysis (provider, contract, usage, devices, budget)?

label: KOA inputs entered accurately
description: 2. Needs & KOA Discovery: Did the agent enter all KOA inputs accurately without manipulation?

label: Telecare requirements confirmed
description: 3. Vulnerability & Duty of Care: Did the agent confirm Telecare requirements?

label: Vulnerability signs identified
description: 3. Vulnerability & Duty of Care: Did the agent identify any signs of vulnerability appropriately?

label: Communication adapted where needed
description: 3. Vulnerability & Duty of Care: Did the agent adapt communication (pace, clarity, check understanding) where needed?

label: Escalation steps followed if needed
description: 3. Vulnerability & Duty of Care: Did the agent follow escalation steps if customer struggled?

label: Required product information provided
description: 4. KOA Comparison: Did the agent provide all required product information (Speed, Averages, Price, Connection type, Contract Length, Price Rises etc)?

label: Customer details confirmed correctly
description: 5. Recap & Confirmation: Did the agent confirm customer details correctly?

label: Payment details handled securely
description: 5. Recap & Confirmation: Did the agent handle payment details securely (no repeating banking info)?

label: T&Cs summarised correctly
description: 5. Recap & Confirmation: Did the agent correctly summarise T&Cs without altering meaning?

label: Cooling-off and cancellation rights explained
description: 5. Recap & Confirmation: Did the agent explain cooling-off and cancellation rights?

label: Mandatory statements covered
description: 5. Recap & Confirmation: Did the agent cover all mandatory statements throughout the journey?

label: One touch switch explained
description: 5. Recap & Confirmation: Did the agent clearly explain one touch switch?

label: Professional rapport maintained
description: 6. Behaviour & Integrity: Did the agent maintain rapport and a professional call flow while remaining polite, friendly, and respectful?

label: No misleading or pressure tactics
description: 6. Behaviour & Integrity: Did the agent avoid misleading statements, pressure-selling, urgency tactics, or any form of mis-selling?

label: Clear consent obtained for contract
description: 7. Closing: Did the agent ensure the customer gave clear consent to enter into a contract?

label: Order processing handoff confirmed
description: 7. Closing: Did the agent confirm the order would be passed to the order processing team?

label: Energy transfer process explained
description: 8. Energy Hotkey: Did the agent correctly explain the energy transfer process and obtain permission to transfer?

label: Customer numbers passed to energy hotkey
description: 8. Energy Hotkey: Did the agent pass the customer's numbers to the energy hotkey?

label: Correct mobile product information given
description: 9. Mobile: Did the agent give correct product information?

label: Exit fees advised when keeping number
description: 9. Mobile: Did the agent advise the customer of any exit fees when keeping the same number?

label: Customer identified as homeowner
description: 10. Utility Warehouse: Did the agent correctly identify the customer as a homeowner?

label: Bundling benefits explained
description: 10. Utility Warehouse: Did the agent correctly explain the benefits of bundling (contract buy out 3+ services)?

label: Cashback card explained correctly
description: 10. Utility Warehouse: Did the agent correctly explain the cashback card when offering it?
